title: HVALS
description: Returns all values in a hash.
complexity: O(N) where N is the size of the hash.

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

codeExamples.description: Foundational: Retrieve all values from a hash using HVALS (returns only values without field names, useful when you only need the data)

intro: Returns all values in the hash stored at `key`.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Returns all values in the hash stored at `key`.

sections.title: Examples
Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility
sections.content:
| Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | |

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

[Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a list of values in the hash, or an empty list when the key does not exist

**RESP3:**

[Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a list of values in the hash, or an empty list when the key does not exist.
